packages.name: Basic System
packages.description: Ideal for small homes. Supports lighting and basic device charging.

packages.name: Medium System
packages.description: Perfect for medium households. Can power a TV, fridge, lighting, and internet devices.

packages.name: Premium System
packages.description: Best for large homes or businesses. Supports multiple appliances and heavy usage.

faq.question: installation
faq.answer: Our installation process typically takes 1 to 2 days, depending on the system size and location.

faq.question: warranty
faq.answer: We offer a warranty of 1 to 3 years, depending on the selected solar system.

faq.question: payment
faq.answer: We accept multiple payment methods including cash and mobile money for your convenience.

faq.question: location
faq.answer: We provide installation services in both urban and rural areas.
